--- RESPONSE ---


Now I understand the pattern. The `time` command needs FFI for fork/exec/wait4/clock_gettime/etc. I'll use raw `extern "C"` declarations since no external crates are available. Let me create the Rust replacement.

ACTION: WRITE_FILE usr.bin/time/Cargo.toml
